settings.heading: A clearer operational page for shipping expectations and return handling
settings.copy: Use this page to explain fulfillment timing, return windows, and how order support connects to contact routes.
settings.support_note: Keep this page practical and operational. Customers should understand timing, policy, and what to do next.

settings.heading: Set expectations before customers need to escalate
settings.copy: Use these cards for shipping windows, return timing, and policy boundaries.

settings.title: Order processing and delivery expectations
settings.copy: Use this card for fulfillment timing and shipping cadence.

settings.title: Return windows and eligibility
settings.copy: Use this card for return periods, condition expectations, or exclusions.

settings.title: Where order questions should go next
settings.copy: Use this card for direct order-support escalation or FAQ routing.

settings.intro_copy: Use the page body for full shipping and returns policy content or merchant-specific operational details.
settings.side_heading: Keep order support separate from technical support when needed
settings.side_copy: Use the side card to steer technical product questions back into the support center.

settings.heading: Still need support with a shipment or return?
settings.copy: Use the final banner for order-support escalation once policy content has done its job.
